summary: A clip from a Fox News interview. A bearded man in a dark suit speaks to camera from a Washington, D.C., remote position, labeled in the lower-third MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY. The banner reads ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT MURDER SUSPECT HAD PRIOR ARREST and later PARENTS OF SHERIDAN GORMAN DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY.
